---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
date: ""
---

```{r setup,echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(sf)
il_combined <- readRDS("~/Desktop/final-project-Smlfberry/data/il_combined.rds")
```

```{r plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=4.5, out.width="100%"}
comparison <- il_combined %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  summarise(avg_turnout = mean(turnout_rate, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(category = factor(category, levels = c("Both", "Low income only", "Low education only", "Neither")))
p <- ggplot(comparison, aes(x = category, y = avg_turnout, fill = category)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Both" = "#e67e22",
    "Low income only" = "#2c7a5e",
    "Low education only" = "#1a3a5c",
    "Neither" = "#d0cfc9"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.50, 0.72)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, family = "Georgia"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#faf9f6", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#faf9f6", color = NA)
  )
ggsave("income_educ_bar.png", p)
```
